examples: As new allegations of lawbreaking surface, journalism itself is reeking.
In September alone, some 1, 500 lawbreaking public-transport drivers were arrested.
But if it is proven that news Corporation's managers condoned lawbreaking, they should not be running any newspaper or television firm.
The police faced lawbreaking on the streets on a scale not seen for decades.
Successive administrations, one Democrat, one Republican, have declined to prosecute this lawbreaking.
